implementation_brief.title: Procurement notice summarizer extension
scope: Parse one supported procurement notice page format.
Produce a short summary with retained source links.
Show uncertainty when required fields are missing.
steps: Create fixtures from public procurement notices.
Define extraction and summary output contracts.
Build a browser-side parser for the first supported page format.
Add regression tests for malformed notices.

claims.text: The target users are small suppliers.
The MVP should preserve source links in summaries.
The extension will reduce review time by 60 percent.

open_questions: which procurement portals are in scope
